summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No merge recommendations are safe because the artifact does not include Codex /review proof and has no hydrated review-bot/comment preflight; #90453 is additionally blocked by multiple failing checks and a medium memory-core availability change.

actions.reason: Independent useful PR, but merge preflight is incomplete and one recorded check failure blocks merge recommendation.

This is a medium availability-sensitive change with broad enough failure signals that the required repair scope is unclear from the artifact; maintainer judgment is needed before planning a repair or merge.
Independent useful PR with passing recorded checks, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Independent useful PR, but merge preflight is incomplete and mergeable_state is unstable.

needs_human: #90453 requires maintainer judgment before repair/merge because the artifact shows a medium availability-sensitive memory-core change with many failing checks and no hydrated review context.
All five PRs need complete merge preflight before any merge action: hydrated review-bot/comment state, resolved comments, Codex /review passing cleanly, current mergeability, and validation commands.
